free_text: The yields of As-73 and As-74 in nuclear reactions
with protons, deuterons and alpha particles
22-cm3 type DGDK Ge(Li) detector having a
resolution of 6 keV at the 0.1227MeV gamma line of 57Co
photopeak-area and decay curve analysis as well
as systematic errors associated with counter
efficiencies and spread in beam energy, errors
in decay scheme are not included.
